author: Marvel YouTube
text:
Marvel Animation's X-Men '97 Season 2 World Premiere
Welcome back, mutants! The cast and filmmakers of Marvel Animation's #XMen97 celebrated the World Premiere of Season 2 at Tribeca Festival. Stream the new season July 1, only on Disney+.
